content: State-of-the-art 2024-2025 active learning agent memory systems can be re-framed as a recursive self-improving agent that curates its own stored knowledge via curiosity-driven selection, rather than just being a static storage component for a separate parent agent. This turns agent memory from a passive infrastructure into an autonomous curious sub-agent that proactively requests updates for under-learned stored knowledge, aligning its behavior with the core active learning goal of maximizing overall agent performance.
